section2/accounts/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and receive security/bug fixes.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
section2/accounts/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target compatibility remains at 17 while the environment is JDK 21.

section2/accounts/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to version 2.6.0 for compatibility with the newer Spring Boot version.

section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for more concise string interpolation.
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.before: super(String.format("%s not found with the given input data %s : '%s'", resourceName, fieldName, fieldValue));
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.after: super("%s not found with the given input data %s : '%s'".formatted(resourceName, fieldName, fieldValue));
